result.sql: SELECT "username", overflow_data->>'profile' AS "json_1_profile", overflow_data->>'attributes' AS "json_2_attributes", overflow_data->>'temperature' AS "json_3_temperature" FROM "chiral_data" WHERE "session_id" = :p_0
UPDATE "chiral_data" SET "overflow_data" = jsonb_set(COALESCE("overflow_data", '{}'::jsonb), '{profile}', CAST(:set_json_profile AS jsonb), true) WHERE "session_id" = :p_0
